violations.text: The floor in the kitchen area and under the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Prep unit #1 was observed iced over and held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The food in unit was observed between 51-52 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Turkey and ham was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC added dates to the products at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The walk-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Wood is used in the construction of both hand sinks in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Wood must be removed or covered with a smooth, durable, and easily cleanable material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The floor in the kitchen area and under the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Some of the hood vents were observed missing from the hood system. Establishment is to replace the hood vents. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The interior fan of the hood system was observed with an accumulation of grease build up. Establishment is to have the interior fan serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
